text: Which of the following statements is true concerning fire hose stations used in the engine room of a tanker or cargo vessel?

options.text: A) It must be marked in red letters two inches high
B) National Standard fire hose coupling threads shall be used
C) In heavy weather, the hose may be removed temporarily from the hydrant

explanation: To maintain compatibility with shore-based equipment and facilitate inter-ship assistance, SOLAS requires that all hose couplings are interchangeable and conform to established national or international standards.
